name: unison-brain
description: Open-source client for the Unison brain — your cloud knowledge base, in any agent.
author: Unison Labs

scripts.build: bun run --filter '@unisonlabs/sdk' build && bun run --filter '@unisonlabs/cli' build && bun run --filter '@unisonlabs/mcp' build
scripts.release: bun run build && npm_config_workspaces=true npm publish -w @unisonlabs/sdk && npm_config_workspaces=true npm publish -w @unisonlabs/cli && npm_config_workspaces=true npm publish -w @unisonlabs/mcp
